infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fieldo requires location access to record and stream your service routes to the administration panel.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Fieldo requires constant background location access to ensure shift compliance mapping even when your device screen is turned off.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Fieldo tracks operational logistics parameters continuously during working hours.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Fieldo to track your delivery/field routes in the background to log your daily shifts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Fieldo to consistently map operational coordinates.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Fieldo to view location metrics when the terminal is active.
